violations.text: Lemon curd prepared at the facility was observed with date mark exceeding 7 days. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

Prep unit cutting boards were not allowed to air dry. Inspector observed pooled water under cutting boards. PIC informed to wash, rinse, and sanitize cutting boards. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the upstairs kitchen area. Inspector observed single-service boxes in direct contact with dirty seat cushions and cases of single-service items on the floor. Boxes moved, items in contact with the cushion were disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: -reach-in freezer (bottom shelf) -flour containers -prep units -bins in unused cold drawers. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
The faucet at the upstairs mop sink was observed held/wrapped with tape. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026
Unsealed wood is used as a support for the walk-in condenser. Unsealed wood was observed near plumbing at the basement 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/18/2026

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored on the speed rack in the upstairs kitchen. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Kitchen was not in use at the time of inspection; PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the service area. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. Wall dispenser was installed and filled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Breads are displayed open on the counter next to register. Food must be protected from contamination by customers. PIC stated display case is in order. Until unit arrives, bread must be displayed in a protected location. PIC moved breads to back of counter during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Dirty sheet pans and other dishes were observed in the mop sink. PIC stated a shelving unit is on order for dirty dishes to be placed prior to washing and sanitizing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the upstairs kitchen area. Inspector observed cases of single service items stored on the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
Dishwasher in basement was non-functional at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2024
A leak was observed near the grease trap and 3-bay sink in the basement kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 10/17/2024
Dish machine in basement was not functional at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sinks in the establishment. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The hand-washing sinks in the establishment was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
The casing of the large mixer was observed with cracks affecting its ability to be effectively cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
Hot water was not available at the time of inspection. Technicians were on site during inspection working on issue. New Violation. Correct By: 09/20/2024
